text_zh: 🇩🇪 德国外交部长：我们现在紧急要求伊朗前往伊斯兰堡，与美利坚合众国进行建设性谈判。附注：在今年一月外国支持的武装骚乱后，德国总理和外交部长曾多次声称伊朗距离崩溃和政权更迭仅有几天之遥。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Trump: Iran has Violated the Cease Fire numerous times!
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗已经多次违反停火协议！

text: Russia and North Korea have connected a new road bridge across the Tumen River, linking the two countries by land for vehicles for the first time. The bridge (opening around mid-2026) will boost trade, transport, and cooperation, adding to their existing rail link.
text_zh: 俄罗斯和朝鲜在图们江上连接了一座新的公路桥，首次通过陆路将两国车辆连接起来。该桥（预计2026年中期开放）将促进贸易、运输和合作，并补充现有的铁路连接。

text: German Chancellor Merz on Trump: The truth is—I try to maintain a reasonable personal relationship with the American president. Right now, we cannot defend ourselves on our own. At the moment, only a few of us can still speak with him in a trusting way. I have access to him—things improve when the doors are closed. But it’s still not good. I didn’t choose him—but he is the president of the United States.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨谈特朗普：事实是——我努力与这位美国总统保持合理的个人关系。目前，我们无法独自保卫自己。现在，我们中只有少数人还能以信任的方式与他交谈。我能接触到他——关起门来谈话时情况会有所好转。但情况依然不容乐观。我没有选择他——但他就是美国总统。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. boarded a second tanker, the sanctioned M/T Tifani, in tge INDOPACOM area which they allege was transporting support for Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国在印太司令部区域登上了第二艘油轮，即受制裁的 M/T Tifani 号，他们声称该船正在为伊朗提供支持。 @wfwitness

text: Iran's Tasnim: Iran says it’s ready if war restarts as the ceasefire ends, blaming the U.S. naval blockade and pressure tactics for blocking negotiations. Tehran has spent the past two weeks preparing militarily and signals it has new capabilities ready, warning it will respond strongly and decisively if conflict resumes.
text_zh: 伊朗塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗表示，如果停火结束导致战争重启，伊朗已做好准备，并指责美国的各种海军封锁和施压策略阻碍了谈判。德黑兰在过去两周进行了军事准备，并暗示已具备新的作战能力，警告称如果冲突恢复，将做出强有力且果断的回应。

text: German Chancellor Merz: With 450 million consumers, we are already larger than the United States. We must break free from what is holding us back. We are being slowed down by labor costs, energy prices, taxes, and social contributions. We must push through reforms—and overcome resistance.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：拥有4.5亿消费者的我们，规模已经超过了美国。我们必须摆脱束缚我们的东西。我们正受到劳动力成本、能源价格、税收和社会缴款的拖累。我们必须推进改革——并克服阻力。

text: Trump: I have always been a big fan of Tim Cook, and likewise, Steve Jobs, but if Steve was not taken from the Planet Earth so young, and ran the company instead of Tim, the company would have done well, but nowhere near as well as it has under Tim.
text_zh: 特朗普：我一直都是蒂姆·库克的忠实粉丝，史蒂夫·乔布斯也一样。但如果史蒂夫没有那么年轻就离开人世，而是由他而不是蒂姆来经营这家公司，公司也会做得很好，但绝不会像在蒂姆领导下那样出色。

text: Germany’s Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul: We consider sanctions against Israel a thing inappropriate. We urgently call on Iran to come to Islamabad and negotiate constructively with the United States of America. Iran should now grasp this extended hand.
text_zh: 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔：我们认为对以色列实施制裁是不恰当的。我们紧急呼吁伊朗前往伊斯兰堡，与美利坚合众国进行建设性谈判。伊朗现在应该抓住这只伸出的手。

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇯🇵 The Japanese shipbuilding company Japan Maritime United has completed the second phase of converting the helicopter carrier JS Izumo into a light aircraft carrier. The ship has been taken out of dry dock, and the main change involved the bow — it was widened and reshaped to enable the operation of short takeoff and vertical landing aircraft. 🔷 The modernization aims to base and operate F-35B Lightning II fighters. The work is being carried out under the Japanese Ministry of Defense program and is expected to be completed by 2027. The program includes two phases: ▪️ The first phase (completed in 2021) involved installing a heat-resistant deck coating and modernizing navigation and marking systems; ▪️ The second phase (from 2024) involves a deep reconstruction of the bow section. After the modernization is completed, procedures will begin to bring the light aircraft carrier to operational readiness, and ultimately, Japan will become a country fully capable of operating carrier-based fighter aviation. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇯🇵 日本造船公司日本海事联合（Japan Maritime United）已完成将“出云”号直升机驱逐舰改装为轻型航空母舰的第二阶段工作。该舰已驶出干船坞，主要改动涉及舰艏——它被加宽并重新塑形，以支持短距起飞和垂直降落飞机的操作。 🔷 此次现代化改造旨在部署和操作 F-35B“闪电II”战斗机。这项工作是在日本防卫省的计划下进行的，预计于2027年完成。该计划包括两个阶段：▪️ 第一阶段（2021年完成）涉及安装耐热甲板涂层以及现代化导航和标记系统；▪️ 第二阶段（从2024年开始）涉及对舰艏部分的深度重建。现代化改造完成后，将开始使轻型航母达到作战就绪状态的程序，最终，日本将成为一个完全有能力操作舰载战斗机的国家。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Netanyahu: In every generation, they rise against us to destroy us — in this generation as well. The regime in Iran planned another Holocaust. It plotted to destroy us with nuclear bombs and thousands of ballistic missiles.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：每一代人中，都有人起来要消灭我们——这一代人也不例外。伊朗政权策划了又一场大屠杀。它密谋用核弹和数千枚弹道导弹来摧毁我们。

text: 🇷🇺 💬 Dmitry Medvedev: Will Article 5 come into effect, and will the United States intervene on behalf of Europe in the event of a conflict with Russia? This question is not trivial, considering that insane European leaders are actively promoting the idea of war with our country, and France and Poland - the current leaders of militaristic Russophobia - have even begun preparations for joint nuclear exercises. Plus, the production of drones for Kiev in several European countries has added additional tension to the pre-storm atmosphere on the continent. So, will the Americans intervene on behalf of Europe in such a case? In my opinion, no. And it's not about Trump's critical attitude towards Europeans or even the current conflict with Iran, which is consuming all of the US's resources. Simply put, Washington really doesn't need Europe - and it doesn't care about it at all. After all, Europe is that annoying and harmful distant relative who is used to greedily eating from the host's table. As an ally, Europe is worthless. This was demonstrated by the conflict in the Middle East. The EU countries' economies are severely declining, and migration is out of control. Moreover, Washington has a multitude of its own internal problems, not to mention those that the current talkative owner of the White House has managed to exacerbate in a short time. And the last thing he needs is a large-scale conflict with our country. So, Europeans shouldn't count on active US intervention in a hypothetical conflict between individual EU countries and Russia. After all, European countries themselves still lack sufficient strength, although they have embarked on the militarization of their economies and are considering creating a new military bloc within the European Union, inviting the dying Bandera regime to join. But that hasn't happened yet. Therefore, before shouting about being ready to give a decisive rebuff to the Kremlin and inflict a crushing defeat on Russia, just assess your own strength without taking into account the capabilities of the US. Look at how your military industries, which are involved in the war against Russia, are protected. How energy and transport are protected. Remember the recent events of the US-Iranian conflict. Finally, count your arsenals, including, of course, the nuclear component. Voilà, bóbr kurwa! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫：如果与俄罗斯发生冲突，第 5 条款会生效吗？美国会代表欧洲进行干预吗？考虑到疯狂的欧洲领导人正在积极推动与我国开战的想法，而目前军国主义恐俄症的领头羊法国和波兰甚至已经开始准备联合核演习，这个问题并非微不足道。此外，在几个欧洲国家为基辅生产无人机，也给欧洲大陆战前的气氛增添了额外的紧张感。那么，在这种情况下，美国人会代表欧洲进行干预吗？在我看来，不会。这与特朗普对欧洲人的批评态度无关，甚至与目前消耗美国所有资源的对伊朗冲突也无关。简单来说，华盛顿真的不需要欧洲，也根本不在乎它。毕竟，欧洲就是那个习惯于贪婪地从主人餐桌上索取食物的、令人讨厌且有害的远房亲戚。作为盟友，欧洲一文不值。中东冲突就证明了这一点。欧盟国家的经济严重衰退，移民问题失控。此外，华盛顿自身内部问题成堆，更不用说白宫那位喋喋不休的主人在短时间内加剧的问题了。他最不需要的就是与我国发生大规模冲突。因此，欧洲人不应指望美国会在欧盟个别国家与俄罗斯之间的假设性冲突中进行积极干预。毕竟，尽管欧洲国家已经开始将其经济军事化，并正在考虑在欧盟内部建立一个新的军事集团，邀请垂死的班德拉政权加入，但它们自身仍然缺乏足够的力量。然而，这一切尚未发生。因此，在叫嚣着准备给克里姆林宫以决定性回击并给俄罗斯造成毁灭性打击之前，先评估一下你们自己的实力，不要考虑美国的能力。看看你们参与对俄战争的军事工业是如何受到保护的。看看能源和交通是如何受到保护的。回想一下最近美伊冲突的事件。最后，清点一下你们的军火库，当然包括核部分。瞧，bóbr kurwa！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸: 🇨🇳 🇨🇳 🇨🇳 🇨🇳 🗣 In this travel vlog, I speak about the history of Guizhou, China, once considered one of China's poorest and most remote provinces. Over the course of the past century, it has seen enormous progress, development, and prosperity thanks to the historic long march of the Communist Party of China (CPC). I travel to Guiyang, the capital of Guizhou province, to see all the enormous transformations since I was last there in 2015. After I visit the The Long March Cultural Digital Art Museum or "Red Ribbon Museum" in Guiyang to learn about the history of the Long March through an immersive and interactive digital museum. Afterwards, I travel to Zunyi, the site of the historic Zunyi Conference of the Long March that helped solidify the leadership of Mao Zedong. We visit Huang Dafa, recipient of the July 1st Medal of the CPC, to see and learn about his heroic 36 year work to bring water to his village by carving a canal into the side of a mountain. Lastly, we visit the world's tallest bridge and engineering wonder of the world, the Huajiang Grand Canyon Bridge. For more and to travel to China, check out: China, Not Just Travel: https://chinanotjusttravel.com/ Discover Guizhou: https://www.ddcpc.cn/gc/index.html 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 Follow me Christopher Helali, on YouTube , X, Instagram, and TikTok
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸：🇨🇳 🇨🇳 🇨🇳 🇨🇳 🗣 在这期旅行视频中，我讲述了中国贵州的历史，它曾被认为是全中国最贫穷、最偏远的省份之一。在过去的一个世纪里，得益于中国共产党（CPC）历史性的长征，它取得了巨大的进步、发展和繁荣。我前往贵州省省会贵阳，看看自 2015 年我上次到访以来的巨大变化。在参观了贵阳的长征数字科技艺术馆（“红飘带”博物馆）后，我通过沉浸式和互动式的数字博物馆了解了长征的历史。之后，我前往遵义，那里是长征中具有历史意义的遵义会议的旧址，这次会议帮助巩固了毛泽东的领导地位。我们拜访了中国共产党“七一勋章”获得者黄大发，了解他 36 年来在悬崖峭壁上开凿水渠，为村庄引水的英雄事迹。最后，我们参观了世界最高桥梁、世界工程奇迹——花江峡谷大桥。欲了解更多信息或前往中国旅行，请访问：China, Not Just Travel: https://chinanotjusttravel.com/ 发现贵州：https://www.ddcpc.cn/gc/index.html 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 在 YouTube、X、Instagram 和 TikTok 上关注我 Christopher Helali

text_zh: 🇺🇸 美国退伍军人在抗议对伊朗战争时被拘留。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇪🇺🇮🇱 Al Jazeera: Spain, Slovenia, and Ireland have called on the European Union to debate suspending its association agreement with Israel, citing the worsening situation in Gaza, the West Bank, and Lebanon. The three countries formally requested the issue…" ⚡ 🇧🇪 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇪🇺 Al Arabiya: Belgium’s Foreign Minister Maxime Prevot stated that Israel’s conduct in Lebanon is “totally unacceptable,” calling for stronger European action. He emphasized that while Hezbollah’s initial attacks should be condemned, Israel’s response has been “disproportionate and indiscriminate,” urging the European Union to reconsider its approach and potentially take further measures. The remarks come ahead of EU discussions on relations with Israel, as several European states push for a tougher stance amid ongoing developments in Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇪🇺🇮🇱 半岛电视台：西班牙、斯洛文尼亚和爱尔兰呼吁欧盟讨论暂停其与以色列的联系国协议，理由是加沙、西岸和黎巴嫩的局势不断恶化。这三个国家正式要求将此议题……” ⚡ 🇧🇪 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇪🇺 阿拉伯电视台：比利时外交大臣马克西姆·普雷沃（Maxime Prevot）表示，以色列在黎巴嫩的行为是“完全不可接受的”，并呼吁欧盟采取更强有力的行动。他强调，虽然应该谴责真主党的初步袭击，但以色列的反应是“不成比例且不加区分的”，他敦促欧盟重新考虑其方针，并可能采取进一步措施。在欧盟讨论与以色列关系之际，随着黎巴嫩局势的持续发展，几个欧洲国家正推动采取更强硬的立场。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ЛАТИНАРЬ: 📝 Венесуэльские спецслужбы под ударом 📝 Хакеры добрались до правительственных баз В Венесуэле назревает скандал с утечкой секретной информации. Хакеры заявили о взломе баз двух силовых структур страны — Национальной разведывательной службы (SEBIN) и Корпуса уголовных расследований (CICPC) . Как утверждают сами взломщики, конфиденциальную удалось получить в ходе скоординированной кибероперации, направленной сразу против нескольких правительственных ведомств. Хакеры назвали слив демонстрацией своих возможностей , а также заявили о намерении и дальше атаковать госструктуры страны. 🔻 Что именно подверглось утечке? ▪️ В руки хакеров попали полные имена и фамилии более 25 тысяч сотрудников венесуэльских спецслужб SEBIN и CICPC. ▪️ Скомпрометированная база данных содержит национальные удостоверения личности и уникальные налоговые идентификаторы (RIF) каждого раскрытого офицера. ▪️ Дополнительно злоумышленники выгрузили служебные учетные данные силовиков, включая их рабочие адреса электронной почты и внутренние логины. 🖍 Масштабная деанонимизация тысяч сотрудников спецслужб может парализовать текущие операции и сделает раскрытых офицеров уязвимыми для точечных международных санкций. ❗️ Для структур безопасности Венесэулы это репутационный удар. Не исключено, что теперь администрации Родригес предстоит масштабная чистка в госструктурах, чтобы продемонстрировать работу нынешней администрации. К слову, это неплохой повод для США предоставить свои возможности для построения архитектуры цифровой безопасности Венесуэлы. #Венесуэла 🔪 @rybar_latam — пульс Нового света 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ЛАТИНАРЬ： 📝 委内瑞拉特工部门遭受打击 📝 黑客入侵政府数据库 委内瑞拉正酝酿一起机密信息泄露丑闻。黑客声称入侵了该国两个强力部门的数据库——国家情报局（SEBIN）和刑事调查局（CICPC）。据黑客本人称，这些机密信息是在针对多个政府部门的协调网络行动中获取的。黑客称此次泄露是展示其能力的一种方式，并表示打算继续攻击该国政府机构。 🔻 究竟泄露了什么？ ▪️ 黑客获取了超过2.5万名委内瑞拉SEBIN和CICPC特工的全名。 ▪️ 被泄露的数据库包含每位被曝光官员的国民身份证件和唯一的税务识别码（RIF）。 ▪️ 此外，攻击者还下载了安全人员的公务凭证，包括他们的工作电子邮箱和内部登录名。 🖍 对数千名特工进行大规模去匿名化可能会瘫痪当前的行动，并使被曝光的官员容易受到针对性的国际制裁。 ❗️ 对于委内瑞拉的安全机构来说，这是一次声誉打击。不排除罗德里格斯政府现在将不得不对政府机构进行大规模清洗，以展示现任政府的工作成果。顺便说一句，这对美国来说是一个不错的机会，可以提供其能力来构建委内瑞拉的数字安全架构。 #委内瑞拉 🔪 @rybar_latam — 新世界的脉搏 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇪🇺🇮🇱 Al Jazeera: Spain, Slovenia, and Ireland have called on the European Union to debate suspending its association agreement with Israel, citing the worsening situation in Gaza, the West Bank, and Lebanon. The three countries formally requested the issue…" ⚡ 🇪🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Anadolu Agency: Spain’s Foreign Minister José Manuel Albares stated that Israel is applying a “Gaza-style strategy” in southern Lebanon, warning it reflects a pattern of widespread destruction and displacement. Albares said the situation includes the destruction of civilian infrastructure, prevention of normal life, and forced displacement of residents, alongside violations of international law and incidents involving UN forces. He warned that such actions could indicate attempts to control parts of Lebanese territory and risk pushing the Middle East toward prolonged instability, reiterating Spain’s position that Israel cannot maintain normal relations with the EU under such conditions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇪🇺🇮🇱 半岛电视台：西班牙、斯洛文尼亚和爱尔兰呼吁欧盟讨论暂停其与以色列的联系国协议，理由是加沙、西岸和黎巴嫩的局势不断恶化。这三个国家正式要求将此议题……” ⚡ 🇪🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 阿纳多卢通讯社：西班牙外交大臣何塞·曼努埃尔·阿尔巴雷斯（José Manuel Albares）表示，以色列正在黎巴嫩南部实施“加沙式战略”，并警告称这反映了一种广泛破坏和流离失所的模式。阿尔巴雷斯表示，这种情况包括破坏民用基础设施、阻碍正常生活、强迫居民流离失所，以及违反国际法和涉及联合国部队的事件。他警告说，此类行动可能表明以色列试图控制黎巴嫩部分领土，并有使中东陷入长期不稳定的风险，他重申了西班牙的立场，即在此类条件下，以色列无法与欧盟维持正常关系。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇪🇺 🇮🇱 Al Jazeera: Spain, Slovenia, and Ireland have called on the European Union to debate suspending its association agreement with Israel, citing the worsening situation in Gaza, the West Bank, and Lebanon. The three countries formally requested the issue be placed on the agenda ahead of an EU foreign ministers’ meeting, arguing that the bloc should reassess its position amid ongoing developments. The EU–Israel Association Agreement governs political and economic relations between the two sides, and any move toward suspension would mark a significant shift in European policy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇪🇺 🇮🇱 半岛电视台：西班牙、斯洛文尼亚和爱尔兰呼吁欧盟讨论暂停其与以色列的联系国协议，理由是加沙、西岸和黎巴嫩的局势不断恶化。这三个国家正式要求在欧盟外交部长会议前将此议题列入议程，并主张欧盟应在当前局势发展中重新评估其立场。《欧盟-以色列联系国协议》管理着双方的政治和经济关系，任何暂停该协议的举动都将标志着欧洲政策的重大转变。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇺🇸 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed : Turkey’s main opposition party, the Republican People’s Party (CHP), has declared U.S. Ambassador to Ankara and special envoy for Syria, Tom Barrack, “persona non grata” and demanded his expulsion. Barrack sparked outrage after stating at the Antalya Diplomacy Forum that “only force is respected in the Middle East” and that strong leadership – including monarchy – has succeeded, while democracy and human rights interventions have failed. CHP leader Özgür Özel called his remarks “absolute insolence” and said Barrack should not remain in Turkey for a minute unless he retracts. Istanbul’s former mayor Ekrem İmamoğlu said the comments violate all diplomatic norms and contradict Turkey’s history, born from the ashes of a monarchy into popular sovereignty. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇺🇸 阿拉伯人报（Al-Araby Al-Jadeed）：土耳其主要反对党共和人民党（CHP）宣布美国驻安卡拉大使兼叙利亚问题特使汤姆·巴拉克（Tom Barrack）为“不受欢迎的人”，并要求将其驱逐。巴拉克在安塔利亚外交论坛上发表言论称“中东只尊重武力”，并称强大的领导力——包括君主制——取得了成功，而民主和人权干预却失败了，此言论引发了愤怒。共和人民党领袖奥兹古尔·奥泽尔（Özgür Özel）称其言论是“绝对的傲慢”，并表示除非巴拉克收回言论，否则他不应在土耳其停留一分钟。伊斯坦布尔前市长埃克雷姆·伊马姆奥卢（Ekrem İmamoğlu）表示，这些评论违反了所有外交准则，并与土耳其从君主制的灰烬中诞生并走向人民主权的历史相矛盾。 @wfwitness

text: Faytuks News No Iranian delegation has traveled to Islamabad so far, according to IRIB 🚨 IRIB Exclusive: No Iranian diplomatic delegation—be it a primary or secondary team, or an initial or follow-up mission—has traveled to Islamabad, Pakistan so far. - IRIB (Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting) tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 据伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台（IRIB）报道，目前还没有伊朗代表团前往伊斯兰堡 🚨 IRIB独家：到目前为止，没有任何伊朗外交代表团——无论是主要还是次要团队，或是初步还是后续任务——前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡。 - IRIB（伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台）推文

text: Open Source Intel Al Mayadeen reports there is no indication that any Iranian delegation has arrived in Islamabad. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） Al Mayadeen报道称，没有迹象表明有任何伊朗代表团抵达伊斯兰堡。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 The Security Service of Ukraine struck the oil station "Samara" in Russia, which produces the export oil grade Urals. Last night, drones from the SBU Special Operations Center "Alpha" caused a large fire at the linear-production-dispatch station "Samara" located in the settlement of Prosvet, Samara region, Russia. This station blends high and low sulfur content oil extracted from various fields, resulting in the export grade Urals. The facility is an important part of Russia's oil transport infrastructure. Preliminary data indicates that SBU drones damaged five reservoirs, each with a capacity of 20,000 cubic meters, which were filled with crude oil. "Damage to such key stations directly reduces Russia's ability to create batches of oil intended for export and fulfill contractual obligations. The crude balance is disrupted, logistics and storage costs increase, and there are risks of supply disruptions. As a result, Russia receives increasingly less revenue from oil sales, which it could use to finance the war against Ukraine," a source from the SBU said. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰安全局袭击了俄罗斯的“萨马拉”石油站，该站生产出口级乌拉尔原油。昨晚，乌克兰安全局（SBU）“阿尔法”特种作战中心的无人机在位于俄罗斯萨马拉地区Prosvet定居点的线性生产调度站“萨马拉”引发了大火。该站将从不同油田开采的高硫和低硫原油进行混合，从而生产出出口级的乌拉尔原油。该设施是俄罗斯石油运输基础设施的重要组成部分。初步数据显示，SBU的无人机损坏了五个储油罐，每个储油罐的容量为2万立方米，里面装满了原油。“对这些关键站点的破坏直接降低了俄罗斯制造出口石油批次和履行合同义务的能力。原油平衡被打破，物流和仓储成本增加，并存在供应中断的风险。结果，俄罗斯从石油销售中获得的收入越来越少，而这些收入本可用于资助对乌克兰的战争，”SBU的一位消息人士说。推文

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Mossad Director David Barnea: A Mossad agent, identified as M., was killed abroad during operations against Iran. Barnea did not specify who M. was, when they died, or which incident it was. He did not say where M. died, only noting that it was outside of Israel’s borders. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 摩萨德局长戴维·巴尼亚（David Barnea）：一名摩萨德特工（代号M）在针对伊朗的行动中在国外丧生。巴尼亚没有具体说明M是谁，他们何时死亡，或者涉及哪起事件。他没有说M在哪里死亡，只是指出是在以色列边境之外。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇳🇵🇸 Al-Akhbar: Gaza’s recovery and reconstruction needs are estimated at approximately $71.4 billion over the next decade, according to a joint UN‑EU assessment. Of this, $26.3 billion is required in the first 18 months to restore essential services,…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇦🇪 🇵🇸 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed : Representatives of the U.S.-led Board of Peace, the body established by U.S. President Trump to oversee Gaza’s reconstruction, have held talks with Dubai‑government owned DP World about managing supply chains and infrastructure projects in the Strip. The discussions included the possibility of building a new port either in Gaza or on the nearby Egyptian coast, as well as establishing a free trade zone. Reconstruction costs for Gaza are estimated at approximately $70‑71 billion over the next decade. The Board of Peace’s plan requires Hamas to disarm before reconstruction can begin. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇳🇵🇸 阿赫巴尔报（Al-Akhbar）：根据联合国与欧盟的联合评估，加沙未来十年的恢复和重建需求估计约为714亿美元。其中，前18个月需要263亿美元来恢复基本服务……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇦🇪 🇵🇸 阿拉伯人报（Al-Araby Al-Jadeed）：由美国总统特朗普设立的负责监督加沙重建的“和平委员会”（Board of Peace）代表，已与迪拜政府所有的环球港务集团（DP World）就管理加沙地带的供应链和基础设施项目进行了会谈。讨论内容包括在加沙或附近的埃及海岸建造新港口的可能性，以及建立自由贸易区的可能性。加沙的重建成本估计在未来十年约为700亿至710亿美元。和平委员会的计划要求哈马斯在重建开始前解除武装。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Minister of Public Works to LBCI on the targeted bridges during the war and new airport in northern Lebanon: There are more than 15 bridges that have been completely or partially destroyed, and the estimate the cost of the damage at around 7 to 8 billion dollars. What we did regarding crossing unsafe bridges was a preventive measure to protect citizens Good news will be announced soon regarding Qlayaat Airport. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩公共工程部长就战争期间被瞄准的桥梁和黎巴嫩北部新机场向LBCI表示：有超过15座桥梁被完全或部分摧毁，估计损失成本约为70亿至80亿美元。我们对不安全桥梁采取的通行限制是一项保护公民的预防措施。关于克莱亚特机场（Qlayaat Airport）的好消息很快就会宣布。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 Mossad director David Barnea revealed at the agency’s Memorial Day ceremony that an operative codenamed “M” was killed killed several years ago. “On this day, I think about the fallen of the Mossad and their choice to contribute for years to Israel’s…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 Kan: A Mossad operative codenamed “M” was killed several years ago in a boating accident on Lake Maggiore in Italy in May 2023, during a meeting described by Italian media as involving Israeli and Italian intelligence officers. Two Italian intelligence officers also died in the accident. Mossad director David Barnea eulogised him at a military funeral in Ashkelon, attended by senior Mossad officials wearing hats and masks. Barnea described him as a “professional of the highest level”. The operative served approximately 30 years in the Mossad. According to a source familiar with the details, his activities significantly contributed to Israel’s campaigns against Iran, including Operation Roaring Lion and Operation “With All Your Heart”. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱 摩萨德局长戴维·巴尼亚在机构阵亡将士纪念日仪式上透露，一名代号为“M”的特工在几年前丧生。“在这一天，我想到摩萨德的阵亡者，以及他们多年来为以色列做出的贡献……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 Kan：一名代号为“M”的摩萨德特工于2023年5月在意大利马焦雷湖的一次划船事故中丧生，据意大利媒体描述，当时涉及以色列和意大利的情报官员。两名意大利情报官员也在事故中丧生。摩萨德局长戴维·巴尼亚在阿什凯隆举行的军事葬礼上悼念了他，出席葬礼的高级摩萨德官员都戴着帽子和口罩。巴尼亚称他为“最高级别的专业人士”。该特工在摩萨德服役了约30年。据一位熟悉细节的消息人士称，他的活动为以色列针对伊朗的行动做出了重大贡献，包括“咆哮的狮子”行动和“全心全意”行动。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Zelensky's Office is discussing the possibility of revoking exit permits from Ukraine for young people aged 18 to 22, Verkhovna Rada MP Dmitry Razumkov said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 乌克兰最高拉达议员德米特里·拉祖姆科夫表示，泽连斯基办公室正在讨论取消18至22岁年轻人离开乌克兰许可的可能性。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF has renewed their warning on the “Yellow line” in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军已针对黎巴嫩南部的“黄线”发出新的警告。 @wfwitness

text: 🇸🇾 ⚡️ Jolani's secret Jihadi duties 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇸🇾 ⚡️ 焦拉尼的秘密圣战职责 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇹 🇮🇷 🇸🇦 🇪🇺 Asharq Al-Awsat : Italian Defence Minister Guido Crosetto has confirmed that discussions are under way to expand the EU’s Aspides naval mission to include protecting the Strait of Hormuz. He firmly rejected any Iranian tolls or restrictions on the waterway, stating it must remain a free passage. Crosetto praised Saudi Arabia’s handling of Iranian attacks and noted that defence cooperation with Riyadh now includes technology transfer and joint production. He added that Iran’s IRGC is effectively running the country, making dialogue difficult, and warned that Iran’s long‑range missiles could one day target European capitals. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇹 🇮🇷 🇸🇦 🇪🇺 《中东报》：意大利国防部长吉多·克罗塞托证实，目前正在讨论扩大欧盟“盾牌”海军任务的范围，以包括保护霍尔木兹海峡。他坚决拒绝伊朗对该水道征收任何通行费或施加限制，并表示该水道必须保持自由通行。克罗塞托赞扬了沙特阿拉伯对伊朗袭击的处理方式，并指出目前与利雅得的国防合作已包括技术转让和联合生产。他补充说，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队实际上在管理该国，这使得对话变得困难，并警告称伊朗的远程导弹有朝一日可能会瞄准欧洲各国首都。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Ukraine's SBU special forces have carried out an armed detention operation against TCC (military conscription) officers in Odessa, according to local sources. Videos circulating online show detained men in military uniform, believed to be TCC personnel. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 据当地消息来源称，乌克兰国家安全局特种部队在敖德萨对征兵中心（TCC）官员执行了武装拘留行动。网上流传的视频显示，被拘留者身穿军装，据信是征兵中心的人员。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🇰🇵 Construction of the automobile bridge between North Korea and Russia is almost complete The ceremony of connecting the last span took place today. The bridge is set to be open in June 2026. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇰🇵 朝鲜与俄罗斯之间的公路桥建设已接近尾声。连接最后一跨的仪式于今日举行。该桥预计将于2026年6月通车。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
